# ocp_data_protection_policy (Data Source)

Represents data protection configuration. Assignable to virtual machines and volumes; describes frequency and retention of primary snapshots, secondary backup & archive.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `archive_count` (Number)
- `customer_id` (String)
- `is_immutable` (Boolean) Primary & backup volume snapshot created with immutable data protection policy cannot be deleted by _anyone_ before it's expiry time.
- `note` (String)
- `primary_snapshot_count` (Number)
- `secondary_backup_count` (Number)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
